title: Maxicrop PPSIYDL Sequestered Iron, 500ML - Iron Infused Natural Seaweed Extract - Protects Against Yellowing - Supports Growth In Difficult Soil Conditions - Plant Nutrition, Blue
features: PREVENT YELLOWING: For correcting Iron deficiency and preventing yellowing of leaves (chlorosis), especially in acid-loving plants
WITH SEAWEED: Maxicrop's Sequestered Iron is infused with Seaweed Extract which naturally promotes dark green foliage and intensely coloured flowers
SUPPORTING: Helps support growth of plants growing in difficult soil conditions
EASY TO USE: Concentrate formula ideal for treating areas when required
ORGANIC: Approved and certified for organic growing by the Soil Association
description: From the manufacturer BOOSTS PLANT HEALTH AND GROWTH Maxicrop's combination of natural seaweed extract and sequestered iron stimulates robust, healthy growth for all plants, ensuring strong roots, lush foliage, and vibrant blooms. ENHANCES GARDEN APPEARANCE Promote rich, dark green leaves and vivid flower colours, while preventing iron deficiency and leaf yellowing (chlorosis), to create a stunning, visually appealing garden year-round. SUPPORTS PLANTS IN CHALLENGING CONDITIONS Tailored for acid-loving plants and effective in alkaline soils, Maxicrop delivers essential nutrients that help plants thrive in difficult environments, making gardening easier and more rewarding.
